title: pseudognaphalium canescens subsp. beneolens
intro: Pseudognaphalium canescens subsp. beneolens, also known as a subspecies of the White everlasting, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pseudognaphalium canescens subsp. beneolens include its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and reduce the risk of certain diseases.
